## DeepTMHMM - Predictions
Predicted topologies can be downloaded in [.gff3 format](TMRs.gff3) and [.3line format](predicted_topologies.3line)
![picture](/resnick/groups/shapirolab/trao2/ndh2_design/parent_info/outputs/tmhmm_parent_64530058/plot.png)
You can download the probabilities used to generate this plot [here](parent_ndh2_lactobacillus_probs.csv)
### Predicted Topologies
```
>parent_ndh2_lactobacillus | TM



```
